Company

A boutique architecture firm led by senior technical judgment.

RB AYOUB Solutions Inc. is a Canadian technology architecture and consulting firm based in Laval, Québec. The firm works with organizations that need senior architectural judgment to design, assess, document, or govern complex technical systems — before, during, or after implementation.

Principal architect

The firm is led by Rizk Ayoub, Principal and Senior Solutions Architect, with more than a decade of experience across government, financial services, healthcare, enterprise systems, cloud platforms, distributed systems, AI-enabled workflows, and blockchain infrastructure.

Capabilities

  • Enterprise and solution architecture
  • Distributed systems and integration
  • Cloud-native platforms
  • AI and agentic systems
  • Blockchain and tokenization
  • Technical governance and documentation

Operating principles

  • Clarity before complexity
  • Architecture before improvisation
  • Evidence before claims
  • Documentation that supports decisions
  • Technology choices that can be operated and maintained

Related R&D work

Related product and protocol work is published separately under EPICORTEK Technologies Inc., a product and R&D company focused on trusted synthetic intelligence infrastructure. RB AYOUB Solutions Inc. remains the services and architecture advisory firm.

Discuss a mandate
RB AYOUB Solutions Inc.

Senior architecture for complex systems.

Based in Laval, Québec.
